title: stelis kentii
intro: Stelis kentii, also known as the Kent's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Stelis kentii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
